description: CompositionRed and black checked top made of 100% cotton, has a wide round neck with gathers to neckline, full front buttoned placket, three quarter length raglan sleeves with contrast cuffs, buttoned pocket on left chest and drawcord at hem with bow tieFitLooseWash careMachine wash using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyWash and dry inside outDo not bleach, do not wringFlat dry in shade or tumble dryWarm ironwrangler has been clothing the world since 1947 and they're showing no sign of slowing down – this pretty top with its Western styling is kept feminine with lacing embellishments, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and leather shoes for a cowgirl look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8”
